response.justification: Bogdan is a genuinely seasoned generalist with nearly two decades of production engineering and current, relevant exposure to MCP servers and agentic-workflow tooling, but the role's core bar is 8+ years building AI-driven solutions and he shows roughly one year, starting April 2025. There is no evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, evaluation pipelines, or LLM optimization work, Python is absent from his skill list, and his customer-facing leadership signal is limited to workshops and consulting rather than leading technical discovery with enterprise stakeholders. Strong engineer, wrong depth profile for a Staff GenAI forward-deployed role.
strengths: Nearly 20 years shipping production software across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput low-latency backend systems
Current hands-on work on MCP code generators and AI-agent infrastructure supporting agentic workflows
Solid TypeScript/Node.js depth with AWS CDK and Kubernetes experience, plus a track record of mentoring and running technical workshops
concerns: Only about one year of AI/GenAI experience against a hard requirement of 8+ years building AI-driven solutions
No demonstrated experience with RAG, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or model performance optimization
Python is not listed among his skills, and there is no evidence of leading technical discovery sessions with enterprise customers

key_factors.factor: No RAG, vector database, or LLM evaluation evidence
Current MCP and agentic-infrastructure work plus strong staff-level engineering foundation
